message:
fix(tui): synthesize ballast volumes from daemon state

The Ballast screen (S5) was always empty because FetchTelemetry
returned None for it and no telemetry adapter populates BallastVolume
data. Now DataUpdate synthesizes a BallastVolume entry from the daemon
state when ballast_volumes is empty, so the screen shows inventory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
